phrases.intent_en: Ask where Via del Boschetto is
phrases.cultural_note: Via del Boschetto is Monti's most picturesque street, lined with independent boutiques, vintage shops and wine bars.

responses.english: Second on the left, going down from Via Nazionale.
responses.phonetic: lah seh-KON-dah ah see-NEES-trah, shen-DEN-doh dah VEE-ah nah-tsyoh-NAH-leh.
responses.local: La seconda a sinistra, scendendo da Via Nazionale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find vintage clothing shops
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, ci sono negozi vintage a Monti?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, chee SOH-noh neh-GOH-tsee VIN-tij ah MON-tee?
phrases.cultural_note: Monti is Rome's most bohemian neighbourhood, known for independent designers and vintage stores.

responses.english: Yes, many on Via del Boschetto and Via Leonina.
responses.phonetic: see, MOL-tee een VEE-ah del bos-KET-toh eh VEE-ah leh-oh-NEE-nah.
responses.local: Sì, molti in Via del Boschetto e Via Leonina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far the Colosseum is from Monti
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto è lontano il Colosseo da qui?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh eh lon-TAH-noh eel koh-los-SEH-oh dah kwee?

responses.english: Five minutes on foot toward the Roman Forum.
responses.phonetic: CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee VER-soh eel FOH-roh roh-MAH-noh.
responses.local: Cinque minuti a piedi verso il Foro Romano.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to have aperitivo in Monti
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si fa l'aperitivo a Monti?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see fah lah-peh-ree-TEE-voh ah MON-tee?

responses.english: At Piazza della Madonna dei Monti, from 6 pm.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah DEL-lah mah-DON-nah day MON-tee, DAL-leh dee-CHOT-toh.
responses.local: In Piazza della Madonna dei Monti, dalle diciotto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro stop serves the Monti neighbourhood
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale fermata della metro è più vicina a Monti?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh fer-MAH-tah DEL-lah MEH-troh eh PYOO vee-CHEE-nah ah MON-tee?

responses.english: Cavour, line B, three minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: kah-VOOR, LEE-neh-ah bee, ah treh mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.local: Cavour, linea B, a tre minuti a piedi.
